title: stevia subpubescens var. opaca
intro: Stevia subpubescens var. opaca, also known as Opaca Stevia, is a type of perennial herb native to Paraguay and Brazil, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Stevia subpubescens var. opaca include its ability to regulate blood sugar levels, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of heart disease and diabetes. Stevia subpubescens var. opaca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
